MANGO-intro

Source: vignettes/MANGO-intro.Rmd
MANGO-intro.Rmd
library(MANGO)
#> R version 4.4.3 (2025-02-28)
#> Platform: x86_64-conda-linux-gnu
#> Running under: Ubuntu 16.04.7 LTS
#> 
#> Matrix products: default
#> BLAS/LAPACK: /data3/psg/ust/micromamba/envs/JL_2026/lib/libopenblasp-r0.3.30.so;  LAPACK version 3.12.0
#> 
#> locale:
#>  [1] LC_CTYPE=en_US.UTF-8       LC_NUMERIC=C              
#>  [3] LC_TIME=ko_KR.UTF-8        LC_COLLATE=en_US.UTF-8    
#>  [5] LC_MONETARY=ko_KR.UTF-8    LC_MESSAGES=en_US.UTF-8   
#>  [7] LC_PAPER=ko_KR.UTF-8       LC_NAME=C                 
#>  [9] LC_ADDRESS=C               LC_TELEPHONE=C            
#> [11] LC_MEASUREMENT=ko_KR.UTF-8 LC_IDENTIFICATION=C       
#> 
#> time zone: Asia/Seoul
#> tzcode source: system (glibc)
#> 
#> attached base packages:
#> [1] stats     graphics  grDevices utils     datasets  methods   base     
#> 
#> other attached packages:
#> [1] MANGO_0.99.0
#> 
#> loaded via a namespace (and not attached):
#>  [1] gtable_0.3.6       jsonlite_2.0.0     dplyr_1.2.0        compiler_4.4.3    
#>  [5] tidyselect_1.2.1   stringr_1.6.0      jquerylib_0.1.4    systemfonts_1.3.1 
#>  [9] scales_1.4.0       textshaping_1.0.4  yaml_2.3.12        fastmap_1.2.0     
#> [13] ggplot2_4.0.2      R6_2.6.1           generics_0.1.4     knitr_1.51        
#> [17] htmlwidgets_1.6.4  forcats_1.0.1      tibble_3.3.1       desc_1.4.3        
#> [21] bslib_0.10.0       pillar_1.11.1      RColorBrewer_1.1-3 rlang_1.1.7       
#> [25] stringi_1.8.7      cachem_1.1.0       xfun_0.56          S7_0.2.1          
#> [29] fs_1.6.6           sass_0.4.10        otel_0.2.0         cli_3.6.5         
#> [33] pkgdown_2.2.0      magrittr_2.0.4     digest_0.6.39      grid_4.4.3        
#> [37] lifecycle_1.0.5    vctrs_0.7.1        evaluate_1.0.5     glue_1.8.0        
#> [41] farver_2.1.2       ragg_1.5.0         rmarkdown_2.30     tools_4.4.3
